flavorText: Land druids bond with a chosen terrain and draw restorative and defensive power from nature.

features.description: Choose a terrain—Arctic, Coast, Desert, Forest, Grassland, Mountain, Swamp, or Underdark. You gain always-prepared bonus spells by level based on that terrain.
During a short rest, recover expended spell slots with combined levels up to half your druid level (rounded up).
You can invoke Channel Divinity-like natural power to restore and bolster allies tied to your terrain bond.
You are immune to being charmed or frightened by elementals and fey.
Creatures attempting to attack you must first succeed on a Wisdom saving throw.

land-circle-spells.summary: Choose a terrain and gain always-ready circle spells that reinforce that biome identity.
land-circle-spells.description: Circle Spells are terrain-anchored bonus access that should feel distinct from your normal prepared pool. They communicate place-based identity and improve day-to-day utility breadth.

choices.name: Arctic
choices.description: Cold-control and endurance-oriented circle spell lane.

choices.name: Coast
choices.description: Mist, water, and mobility-oriented circle spell lane.

choices.name: Desert
choices.description: Heat, attrition, and harsh-environment circle spell lane.

choices.name: Forest
choices.description: Growth, concealment, and beast/nature utility lane.

choices.name: Grassland
choices.description: Wind, movement, and open-field control lane.

choices.name: Swamp
choices.description: Debuff, decay, and difficult-terrain pressure lane.

choices.name: Underdark
choices.description: Darkness, secrecy, and subterranean control lane.

land-natural-recovery.summary: Recover part of your slot economy on a short rest so Land druids stay magical across longer adventuring days.
land-natural-recovery.description: Natural Recovery is a slot economy feature. It matters because it lets Circle of the Land feel like the druid most capable of stretching magic through a full day of exploration and multiple fights.
land-natural-recovery.usage: Once per day during a short rest, recover spell slots with combined levels up to half your druid level (rounded up).

land-lands-aid.summary: Call on your terrain bond for practical ally support that swings attrition and positioning.
land-lands-aid.description: Land’s Aid should read like a direct expression of your terrain bond: restorative, stabilizing, and practical rather than flashy.
land-lands-aid.usage: Activate Land’s Aid to bolster allies in your local zone.
land-lands-aid.recovery: Typically once per long rest unless modified by table rules.

land-natures-ward.summary: The natural world hardens you against control and corruption that would break lesser wanderers.
land-natures-ward.description: Nature’s Ward is a defense identity feature. It reinforces Circle of the Land as the seasoned druid who belongs outdoors so completely that hostile influences struggle to take hold.

land-natures-sanctuary.summary: Wild creatures hesitate to harm you, reflecting how deeply your circle is accepted by the natural world.
land-natures-sanctuary.description: Nature’s Sanctuary is a late-game identity feature more than a raw damage tool. It should feel like the world itself acknowledging your place within it.
